name: 17th Avenue West Park
description: Come play pickleball at 17th Avenue West Park in Bradenton, FL! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Anna Maria Island Community Center
description: Anna Maria Island Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Anna Maria, FL. There are 6 hard courts. 3 are indoors and 3 are outdoors. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.
open_play_schedule: Indoor and outdoor times varies.  Best to contact the office for specific hours.
fees: Members only — None-member daily rate $20 for the day

name: Palmetto Tennis Courts
description: Nice dedicated pickleball courts. There are benches around the courts. Plenty of space between the courts for ATPs. They have large "mops" for drying the surface after a rain shower. There is a portapotty on site as well as a covered bench for shade outside of the fenced-in courts. The county website says it's open from sunrise to sunset.
